nasb.text: The king said to Daniel, whose name was Belteshazzar, “Are you able to make known to me the dream which I have seen and its interpretation?”

esv.text: The king declared to Daniel, whose name was Belteshazzar, “Are you able to make known to me the dream that I have seen and its interpretation?”

cnv.text: 王問稱為伯提沙撒的但以理說：“你能向我說明我所見的夢和夢的意思嗎？”

ccb.text: 王就问又名伯提沙撒的但以理：“你能将我做的梦和梦的意思告诉我吗？”
